# 🔐🎨⚡ Music Library — Security, Accessibility, Performance Audit

**Date:** 2026-05-31
**Scope:** Seven74AI/music-library fork
**Generated by:** researcher (kanban task t_68f78b15)

---

## Executive Summary

Overall grade: **B** — Solid foundations, specific gaps in CSP, session security, route splitting, and keyboard navigation.

| Dimension | Grade | Key Finding |
|-----------|-------|-------------|
| Security | B- | Hardcoded session fallback + missing CSP |
| Accessibility | B+ | Excellent forms/aria, missing skip-link + 22 unlabeled SVG links |
| Performance | C+ | No route splitting, Sentry loaded when disabled, 1.26MB total JS |

---

## 1. Security

### 1.1 Secrets Exposure — ✅ CLEAN

Scanned all source files, git history, `.env.example`, and config. **No real secrets exposed.** All values in `.env.example` are mock placeholders (MOCK_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID, mock-access-key, etc.). Test files use test-only values.

### 1.2 npm audit — ⚠️ 8 vulnerabilities

```
@hono/node-server <1.19.13  — MODERATE — Path traversal via repeated slashes (serveStatic)
glob 11.0.0-11.0.3           — HIGH     — Command injection via -c/--cmd (CLI only)
uuid <11.1.1                 — MODERATE — Missing buffer bounds check
```

Note: All fixes require breaking changes (prisma@6.19.3, @sentry/react-router@10.55.0, react-router-devtools@1.0.0). The `glob` vulnerability is CLI-only (not exploitable at runtime). The `@hono/node-server` vuln is in prisma's dev dependency chain — low risk.

**Recommendation:** Apply non-breaking fixes first, then plan a coordinated major-bump PR for the rest.

### 1.3 Session Security — 🔴 P0: Hardcoded Fallback Secret

```typescript
// app/utils/session.server.ts:9
secrets: process.env.SESSION_SECRET?.split(',') || ['fallback-secret'],
```

**Risk:** If `SESSION_SECRET` env var is missing in production, ALL user sessions are signed with the literal string `fallback-secret`. Any attacker who sees this code (it's public) can forge valid session cookies. This is a **session hijacking vulnerability**.

**Fix:** Remove the fallback. Throw an explicit error at startup if SESSION_SECRET is not set in production.

Session config is otherwise well-done: `httpOnly: true`, `sameSite: 'lax'`, `secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production'`.

### 1.4 Content Security Policy — 🔴 P0: Missing CSP Header

```typescript
// server/index.ts:75-79
app.use((_, res, next) => {
    helmet(res, { general: { referrerPolicy: false } })
    next()
})
```

The app uses `@nichtsam/helmet` but does NOT set a `Content-Security-Policy` header. Helmet's CSP middleware is available but not configured. This means:

- No XSS protection for the audio player (streams audio from `/resources/audio/:trackId`)
- No frame-ancestors restriction
- No script-src restrictions on inline scripts (root.tsx has several `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` blocks with nonces)

**Fix:** Add CSP header via helmet with appropriate directives for the app's resource loading patterns.

### 1.5 File Upload Validation — ✅ Well-Implemented

The upload pipeline has proper validation:
- MIME type whitelist (10 allowed audio types) in `app/routes/api+/upload-audio.tsx`
- Size limit: 100MB per file
- ZIP extraction validates extensions and skips files <1KB (zip bomb protection)
- Auth check: `requireUserWithRole(request, 'admin')` before upload

### 1.6 Auth Implementation — ✅ Solid

- Password hashing: bcrypt with 10 rounds
- Password validation: haveibeenpwned.com API check
- Session expiration: 30 days, database-backed sessions
- Rate limiting: express-rate-limit with tiered limits (strongest on auth routes)
- CSRF: Honeypot protection via remix-utils
- 2FA support: TOTP-based (epic-web/totp)

### 1.7 Rate Limiting — ✅ Well-Configured

Tiered rate limits in `server/index.ts`:
- `strongestRateLimit`: 10 req/min on login/signup/verify/admin/onboarding/reset-password
- `strongRateLimit`: 100 req/min on all non-GET routes
- `generalRateLimit`: 1000 req/min on GET routes
- Uses Fly-Client-Ip header for accurate IP behind Fly.io proxy

---

## 2. Accessibility

### 2.1 axe-core Audit Results

Automated scan of 6 key pages with axe-core v4.11.3 + Playwright (WCAG 2.1 A/AA):

| Page | Violations |
|------|-----------|
| Home (/) | 1 — `link-name`: 22 unlabeled SVG links |
| Login (/login) | 0 ✅ |
| Signup (/signup) | 0 ✅ |
| Music (/music) | 0 ✅ |
| Playlists (/playlists) | 0 ✅ |
| Search (/users) | 0 ✅ |

**Only violation:** The marketing homepage has 22 SVG logo links (Epic Stack, Remix, Fly.io, etc.) inside `<a>` tags without discernible text — screen readers can't identify them.

### 2.2 Skip-to-Content Link — 🔴 Missing

No skip-to-content link found anywhere in the app. Keyboard users must tab through the full navigation (logo, search bar, theme toggle, user menu) on every page before reaching content.

**Fix:** Add `<a href="#main-content" className="sr-only focus:not-sr-only">Skip to content</a>` before the header in root.tsx, with `id="main-content"` on the `<Outlet />` wrapper.

### 2.3 Form Accessibility — ✅ Excellent

The `forms.tsx` component library has professional-grade accessibility:
- `htmlFor` on all labels linking to inputs via `useId()`
- `aria-invalid` on error states
- `aria-describedby` linking to error messages
- Consistent error display with `ErrorList` component
- Same patterns applied to Field, TextareaField, OTPField, CheckboxField

### 2.4 Audio Player Accessibility — ✅ Well-Done

- `aria-label` on all controls (Play, Pause, Previous track, Next track, Loop, Shuffle, Close player, Open queue, Remove track from queue)
- Seek slider has `aria-label="Seek"`
- Queue sheet uses Sheet from Radix UI (built-in accessibility)
- Track thumbnails have `alt` text

### 2.5 Landmarks — ⚠️ Needs Improvement

The root layout has `<header>` and `<nav>` but lacks:
- `role="banner"` on the header
- `role="main"` on the main content area
- `role="contentinfo"` on the footer (no footer exists)

### 2.6 Image Alt Text — ✅ Good Coverage

All `<TrackThumbnail>`, `<PlaylistCover>`, user avatars, and service logos have dynamic alt text. 19 instances of `alt={...}` found throughout the codebase.

### 2.7 Color Contrast / Dark Mode — ✅ Supported

Tailwind's `dark:` variants used extensively. Status messages, alerts, badges, and notifications all have dark mode variants with readable contrast ratios.

---

## 3. Performance

### 3.1 Bundle Analysis

Total client JS: **1,261,320 bytes (1.26 MB)**

Top 10 largest chunks:

| Chunk | Size | Concern |
|-------|------|---------|
| entry.client | 189 KB | Main entry bundle |
| monitoring.client (Sentry) | 182 KB | 🔴 Loaded even when SENTRY_DSN is empty! |
| chunk-QUQL4437 | 132 KB | Shared React/tooling chunk |
| dropdown-menu | 66 KB | Radix dropdown |
| playlists._playlistId | 62 KB | 🔴 Single route, all loaded eagerly |
| types-uPG8Ai6Y | 57 KB | Type info leaking into client bundle |
| manifest | 48 KB | Webmanifest shouldn't be this large |
| root | 42 KB | Root layout |
| misc | 32 KB | Utility barrel |
| debug-build | 30 KB | Debug code in production? |

### 3.2 Route Lazy Loading — 🔴 None Implemented

All 50+ routes are imported statically via `remix-flat-routes`. **No `React.lazy()` or React Router v7 lazy route loading is used anywhere.** This means the browser downloads and parses ALL route code on first visit, regardless of which page the user opens.

**Routes that would benefit most from lazy loading:**
- `/playlists/:id` (62 KB chunk)
- `/upload` (24 KB chunk)
- YouTube sync pages (auth, playlists, playlist.$id — combined ~80 KB)
- Settings pages (profile, 2FA, passkeys, photo — combined ~30 KB)
- Admin pages (/admin/cache — 3.3 KB)

React Router v7 supports route-level lazy loading natively via `route.lazy`. The `remix-flat-routes` adapter would need to be configured to output lazy routes.

### 3.3 Sentry Bundle Waste — 🔴 182KB Dead Weight

`monitoring.client.js` (182 KB) is the SECOND largest chunk and is loaded unconditionally — even when `SENTRY_DSN` is empty. The check in `server/index.ts` correctly prevents server-side Sentry init when DSN is missing, but the client bundle has no such guard.

**Fix:** Conditionally import Sentry client-side only when DSN is configured, or add a Vite plugin to tree-shake it when SENTRY_DSN is empty.

### 3.4 Image Optimization — ✅ Good

- `loading="lazy"` on track thumbnails and playlist covers
- `sharp` v0.34.2 for server-side image processing
- `openimg` for on-the-fly optimization via `/resources/images`
- SVG sprite preloaded with `fetchPriority: 'high'`
- Favicon and apple-touch-icon excluded from inlining

### 3.5 Virtual Scrolling — ✅ Implemented

- `@tanstack/react-virtual` used for queue (5k+ tracks) and track lists
- Proper overscan and range extraction

### 3.6 Audio — ✅ Optimized

- `preload="metadata"` on the audio element
- Audio format priority: FLAC > WAV > MP3 > M4A > OGG > AAC > WebM
- Server-side audio streaming via `/resources/audio/:trackId`

---

## 4. Findings Summary

### 🔴 P0 — Must Fix (Security)

1. **SESSION_SECRET hardcoded fallback** (`app/utils/session.server.ts:9`)
   - Remove `|| ['fallback-secret']` and throw at startup if missing in production.
   - Session hijacking vulnerability.

2. **Missing Content-Security-Policy header** (`server/index.ts:75-79`)
   - Add CSP via helmet with appropriate directives.
   - XSS protection gap for audio embeds and inline scripts.

### 🟡 P1 — Should Fix

3. **No route lazy loading** — all 50+ routes bundled eagerly, 1.26MB total JS
   - Implement React Router v7 route-level `lazy()` on all non-critical routes.
   - Target: playlists, upload, YouTube sync, settings, admin pages.

4. **Sentry client bundle loaded unconditionally** — 182KB wasted when SENTRY_DSN is empty
   - Conditionally import or tree-shake monitoring.client based on env.

5. **Missing skip-to-content link** — keyboard accessibility regression
   - Add skip link in root.tsx before the header.

6. **npm audit: 8 vulnerabilities (2 high, 6 moderate)**
   - Apply fixable non-breaking updates first.
   - Plan coordinated PR for breaking changes (prisma, sentry, react-router-devtools).

7. **Home page: 22 unlabeled SVG links** — `link-name` axe-core violation
   - Add `aria-label` or visually hidden text to marketing page SVG logo links.

### 🟢 P2 — Nice to Have

8. **No explicit landmark roles** — missing `role="main"`, `role="banner"`, `role="contentinfo"`
   - Add landmark roles to root layout for screen reader navigation.

9. **sameSite: 'lax'** — partial CSRF protection
   - Consider upgrading to `'strict'` if no cross-site navigation flows depend on it.

10. **manifest.js is 48KB** — webmanifest with embedded metadata
    - Strip non-essential metadata from the generated webmanifest.

11. **debug-build chunk (30KB) in production** — dev-only code leaking
    - Verify that debug utilities are tree-shaken in production builds.

12. **Sentry effectively disabled** — SENTRY_DSN is empty in config
    - Either configure Sentry or remove the dependency to save 182KB+.

---

## 5. What's Already Good

- ✅ File upload validation (MIME whitelist, size limits, auth checks)
- ✅ Password hashing (bcrypt 10 rounds) + pwned password check
- ✅ Rate limiting (tiered, Fly-Client-Ip aware)
- ✅ Form accessibility (htmlFor, aria-invalid, aria-describedby)
- ✅ Audio player accessibility (aria-labels on all controls)
- ✅ Image alt text throughout
- ✅ Virtual scrolling for large lists
- ✅ Audio preloading strategy (metadata-only)
- ✅ SVG sprite preloading with high priority
- ✅ Image lazy loading on track thumbnails
- ✅ No real secrets exposed in code or git history
- ✅ Dark mode support with proper contrast variants
- ✅ Honeypot CSRF protection
- ✅ 2FA support (TOTP)

---

## 6. Methodology

- **Secrets scan:** Grep for common secret patterns across all source files, plus `git log -S` for key patterns
- **npm audit:** Standard `npm audit` run on installed dependencies
- **Bundle analysis:** Post-build inspection of `build/client/assets/` with file size aggregation
- **axe-core:** Automated WCAG 2.1 A/AA scan on 6 key pages via `@axe-core/playwright` v4.11.3
- **Code review:** Manual inspection of auth, session, CSP, upload validation, and form components
- **Route analysis:** Static analysis of `app/routes.ts` configuration and route file sizes
